description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build Brew Packages that can be triggered by a workflow call or a manual dispatch with required ice_version and channel inputs. The workflow checks out the repository, sets up C++, and configures caching for two separate jobs: build-xcfranework-packages and build-brew-packages. The build-xcfranework-packages job builds XCFramework packages on macOS 15, creates zip archives, and uploads them as artifacts. The build-brew-packages job builds Homebrew packages but only runs if the channel input is 'nightly', updating and pushing a nightly tap and uploading artifacts.
